title: Simikarty
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Simikarty |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]][[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] |pronouns=He/him |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Master Simikarty's writings are his interpretations of the Code, not part of the Code itself. ''[…]'' More tradition, under a different name.''"
"''You do not approve of tradition?''"
"''I don't approve of simply and blindly accepting it as truth. ''[…]'' Nor can we afford to do so. The lists of Jedi are shrinking all across the Republic. If we're to continue our role as the guardians of peace and justice, we must find ways to increase our numbers.|Jedi Master Jorus C'baoth and a Duros Jedi Knight|}} '''Simikarty''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] of the [[Old Republic era]]. ==Biography== A [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] of some renown, Simikarty produced a [[Teyan Apologia|set of extremely influential writings]] about the [[Jedi Code/Legends|Jedi Code]]. Part of these texts were the beliefs that [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] should be limited in their number of apprentices, and that under no circumstances could [[Padawan/Legends|Padawans]] over a certain age be taken. Over the [[Standard year/Legends|years]], Simikarty's interpretations began to be accepted as canon by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Additionally, Simikarty's [[Writing/Legends|writings]] ended the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Order's]] exploration of [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]] technologies, causing all clone experimentation to be abandoned. ==Appearances== *[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}} *''[[SkyeWalkers: A Clone Wars Story]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/source/praji/20090205.html|text=Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji|int=Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji}} *''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Simikarty }} [[Category:Authors]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Philosophers]] [[Category:Pre-Ruusan Jedi Masters]]
